themes.label: Fear/Anxiety
themes.summary: This chapter deals with fear, dread, anxiety, alarm, or the call not to be afraid. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "'My heart panted, fearfulness affrighted me: the night of my pleasure hath he turned into fea...". Word-study detail reinforces "לַחֲרָדָֽה׃: into fear - fear, anxiety".

themes.label: Provision
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes God’s supplying care, nourishment, sufficiency, or generous provision. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "Jerome on Commentary on Isaiah: (Verse 13 onwards) Burden in Arabia. In the evening you will...". Word-study detail reinforces "הַשֻּׁלְחָ֛ן: the table - a table (as spread out); by implication, a meal".

themes.label: Worship
themes.summary: This chapter gives prominence to praise, worship, thanksgiving, or blessing God’s name. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "Jerome on Commentary on Isaiah: (Verse 13 onwards) Burden in Arabia. In the evening you will...". Cross references echo "Glory".
